upstreamBehavior: Mermaid v11.16.0 (PR #7708) honors `align row|column` directives as fcose relative-placement constraints. Agentic Mermaid parses, models, and round-trips align directives losslessly and renders the diagram, but the deterministic layered layout does not apply the alignment as a placement constraint; verify announces the limitation with a Tier-3 UNSUPPORTED_SYNTAX lint (syntax: architecture_align) that never flips verify.ok.
notes: Executable ledger: honoring align as a deterministic placement constraint is the remaining gap (plan Architecture item 1, deferred with port routing); the BUILD-20 upstream-suite align cases are imported as green cases.
